Constant.text: Kepler Universal Variable, for all conic patch orbit
Return Universal Anomaly X since Delta Time

CustomInstruction.callFormat: F and G function from Universal (0) Initial (1) since (2)
CustomInstruction.format: F and G function from Universal |anomaly| Initial |position| since |deltatime|
CustomInstruction.name: F and G function from Universal

Constant.text: input: Universal Anomaly since delta t, r0. Required Mu and Reciprocal SMA

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Orbit Prediction from (0) (1) elapsed (2) sec, with Mu = (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Orbit Prediction from |position| |velocity| elapsed |time| sec, with Mu = |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Orbit Prediction from

Constant.text: Predictor for guessing future orbit state vector, based on Lagrange formula

CallCustomInstruction.call: F and G function from Universal

CustomInstruction.callFormat: F. and G. from Universal (0) initial (1) last (2) since (3)
CustomInstruction.format: F. and G. from Universal |anomaly| initial |position1| last |position2| since |deltatime|
CustomInstruction.name: F. and G. from Universal

Constant.text: input: Universal Anomaly since delta t, r0, r since delta t. Required Mu and Reciprocal SMA
Newton's Method to solve Kepler's Equation, given Eccentricity & Mean Anomaly
Output Value is E, Eccentric Anomaly
Find planet rototation rate in rad/s
Gibbs Method of Orbit Determination, return orbital state vector, all vector must be coplanar
Formula for orbital launch with AN opportunity, given variable total time to orbit

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Calculating Launch Trajectory, Craft's Diameter (0) m
CustomInstruction.format: Calculating Launch Trajectory, Craft's Diameter |diameter| m
CustomInstruction.name: Calculating Launch Trajectory, Craft's Diameter

Constant.text: Initial Craft value, set by yourself

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Impulsive Burn (0) at True Anomaly (1) Delay (2) Vector (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Impulsive Burn |text| at True Anomaly |true_anomaly| Delay |timer| Vector |vector|
CustomInstruction.name: Impulsive Burn

Constant.text: For burn time less than a minute
y1 = velocity (v), y2 = gamma (ɣ), y3 = downrange (x), y4 = height (h)

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Lagrange F and G function (0) (1) change in True Anomaly (2) Mu (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Lagrange F and G function |position| |velocity| change in True Anomaly |true_anomaly| Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Lagrange F and G function

Constant.text: Calculate Lagrange F and G coefficient from the change in True Anomaly
time derivative of F and G Lagrange coefficient

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Orbital State Vector (0) (1) change in True Anomaly (2) Mu (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Orbital State Vector |position| |velocity| change in True Anomaly |true_anomaly| Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Orbital State Vector

Constant.text: Compute State Vector from the initial State Vector and the change in True Anomaly

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Gravity Turn, h (0) ɣ (1) burn time (2) max time (3) time steps (4)
CustomInstruction.format: Gravity Turn, h |height| ɣ |angle| burn time |burnout| max time |timeout| time steps |second|
CustomInstruction.name: Gravity Turn, h

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Wait Time for (0) in (1) sec, Heading (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Wait Time for |text| in |time| sec, Heading |vector|
CustomInstruction.name: Wait Time for

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Time from True Anomaly (0) to (1) Mu (2) State Vector (3) (4)
CustomInstruction.format: Time from True Anomaly |anomaly1| to |anomaly2| Mu |Mu| State Vector |position| |velocity|
CustomInstruction.name: Time from True Anomaly

Constant.text: Calculate delta time between true anomaly

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Time Since Periapsis (0) (1) True Anomaly (2) Mu (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Time Since Periapsis |position| |velocity| True Anomaly |true_anomaly| Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Time Since Periapsis

Constant.text: Calculate time from Perigee to True Anomaly, not accurate for elliptic orbit with e > 0.65 due to Laplace's Limit

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Rendezvous (0) from (1) (2) to (3) (4) within (5) sec, Delay (6) sec, Precision (7) m, Mu (8)
CustomInstruction.format: Rendezvous |title| from |position1| |velocity1| to |position2| |velocity2| within |transfer_time| sec, Delay |delay| sec, Precision |precision| m, Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Rendezvous

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Matching Orbit Inclination (0) Right Ascension (1) Precision (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Matching Orbit Inclination |inclination| Right Ascension |RA| Precision |error|
CustomInstruction.name: Matching Orbit Inclination

Constant.text: Total Time = item no 6 on State_Vector List

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Warp from (0) (1) to (2) (3) Precision (4) ETA (5) sec
CustomInstruction.format: Warp from |position| |velocity| to |position2| |velocity2| Precision |precision| ETA |ETA| sec
CustomInstruction.name: Warp from

Constant.text: Estimate time to target, output variable: transfer_time

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Perifocal Frame of (0) (1) at True Anomaly (2) with Mu (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Perifocal Frame of |position| |velocity| at True Anomaly |anomaly| with Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Perifocal Frame of

Constant.text: Find orbital state vector given true anomaly

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Perifocal Frame of Vector (0) with State Vector (1) (2) Mu (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Perifocal Frame of Vector |vector| with State Vector |position| |velocity| Mu |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Perifocal Frame of Vector

Constant.text: Find orbital state vector given true anomaly and state vector

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Orbit Transfer to Altitude (0) True Anomaly (1)
CustomInstruction.format: Orbit Transfer to Altitude |altitude| True Anomaly |true_anomaly|
CustomInstruction.name: Orbit Transfer to Altitude

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Perifocal Frame True Anomaly (0) Eccentricity (1) Angular Momentum (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Perifocal Frame True Anomaly |true_anomaly| Eccentricity |eccentricity| Angular Momentum |angular_momentum|
CustomInstruction.name: Perifocal Frame True Anomaly

Constant.text: Find orbital state vector given true anomaly

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Encounter (0) from (1) (2) to (3) (4) Periapsis (5) m, ETA (6) sec
CustomInstruction.format: Encounter |target| from |position1| |velocity1| to |position2| |velocity2| Periapsis |periapsis| m, ETA |ETA| sec
CustomInstruction.name: Encounter

Constant.text: Calculating | DeltaV {0:n3} m/s | Periapsis {1:n2} km | Target {2:n0} km

Please select your parking orbit
input by number
Please type your desire orbit altitude
Please type your desire orbit inclination
Please type your desire orbit Right Ascension
Kepler's Equation, Newton's Method, Lambert's Problem Solver, Runge-Kutta 4th ODE Solver, Gibbs Orbit Determination.
Keep reminder the game engine using left handed 3D axis, vector cross product using left handed rule too.
Don't complaint about my vizzy, i'm not an engineer or programmer
Select a target in map or nav sphere. Launch will wait until a target exists.
Target acquired. Starting launch and transfer sequence.

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Transfer to Planet (0) Periapsis (1) m, Launch from Ground (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Transfer to Planet |target| Periapsis |periapsis| m, Launch from Ground |value|
CustomInstruction.name: Transfer to Planet

Constant.text:
Please select your destination
input by number
Using generic engine detection from Performance.* for universal compatibility.

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Lambert's Problem Solver (0) to (1) in (2) sec, Mu = (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Lambert's Problem Solver |position1| to |position2| in |time| sec, Mu = |Mu|
CustomInstruction.name: Lambert's Problem Solver

Constant.text: Solution for Lambert's Problem, input: vectorR1, vectorR2, & elapsed time

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Hyperbolic Transfer Time to (0) Node (1) ETA (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Hyperbolic Transfer Time to |target| Node |node| ETA |ETA|
CustomInstruction.name: Hyperbolic Transfer Time to

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Plane (0) Manuever to Inclination (1) Right Ascension (2)
CustomInstruction.format: Plane |text| Manuever to Inclination |inclination| Right Ascension |RA|
CustomInstruction.name: Plane

CustomExpression.format: Target DeltaV, to |TargetEnergy| from |PotentialEnergy| with |position| |velocity| return (0)
CustomExpression.name: Target DeltaV, to

CustomExpression.format: True Anomaly at Radius |radius| m return (0)
CustomExpression.name: True Anomaly at Radius
